EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISpatialReferenceFactory3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that create vertical datums or coordinate systems.

[Guid("59025A77-2CF9-4EF6-992A-1EA18F0012F0")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISpatialReferenceFactory3 : ISpatialReferenceFactory2, ISpatialReferenceFactory

IGeoTransformationOperationSet GeoTransformationDefaults { get; }

IGeoTransformationOperationSet

CreateESRISpatialReferenceInfo(string, out ISpatialReferenceInfo, out int)

Creates a spatial reference system and defines it from the specified ESRISpatialReference buffer.

void CreateESRISpatialReferenceInfo(string spatRefInfo, out ISpatialReferenceInfo SpatialReference, out int cBytesRead)

Parameters

spatRefInfo string
SpatialReference ISpatialReferenceInfo
cBytesRead int
